scripts.build: npm run build -w @pmt/shared && npm run build -w @pmt/strategies && npm run build -w @pmt/collector && npm run build -w @pmt/dashboard
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @pmt/shared && npm run build -w @pmt/strategies && concurrently -n collector,dashboard -c cyan,magenta "npm run collector" "npm run dashboard"
